title: breynia poomae
intro: Breynia diospyrifolia, also known as Breynia nobile, is a plant species that belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Breynia poomae include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate joint pain, and promote overall well-being. In terms of herbal preparations, Breynia poomae can be consumed as a decoction or infused in water to reap its medicinal benefits.
